_comment: AoA modded-biome spawn fix: EndermanOverhaul's windswept_hills variant is pinned to the vanilla windswept_hills biome only. Re-add on #c:is_windswept (RU/BWG/Terralith all populate it) so it appears in modded windswept biomes. EO already covers most variants via broad tags; these 4 single-biome ones were the gap.
